title: [PLACEHOLDER] Pipeline smoke-test lesson
body_md:
# Placeholder lesson

This is **not** real content. It only verifies the platform pipeline works. Two trivial exercises follow.

exercises.title: Return 42
exercises.statement_md: Implement `answer()` so it returns the integer `42`.

exercises.title: Add two numbers
exercises.statement_md: Implement `add(a, b)` returning their sum. Two tests check it.
